session.user: Run `make fast-ci` and report results. This is a docs-only change so we mainly care about formatting checks passing. Report any failures.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results.

session.assistant:
The `make fast-ci` command failed with exit code 2. Here are the failures detected:
**Prettier Formatting Check FAILED:** Code style issues found in 4 files:
1. `docs/learned/ci/composite-action-patterns.md` 2. `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` 3. `docs/learned/pr-operations/resubmission-workflows.md` 4. `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
All other checks passed: - Ruff linting: PASSED - Type checking (ty): PASSED - Unit tests (5,583 tests): PASSED - Additional test suites: PASSED
To fix the formatting issues in the 4 markdown files, run: ```bash prettier --write docs/learned/ci/composite-action-patterns.md docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md docs/learned/pr-operations/resubmission-workflows.md docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md ```
